package rulecoverage

func NegativeServiceConstructorAcceptsUntypedConfigMap() string {
    ruleID := "service_constructor_accepts_untyped_config_map"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Services configured by `map[string]any` or similar untyped blobs."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
